ai_output.summary: Computacenter's North American business drove growth for the company, with higher expansion coming from the region. The UK and Germany had solid years, but North America led the way. The company's strategy to expand in North America has been deemed successful. The region's performance was highlighted as outstanding for the company. The financial year in question is 2025.
ai_output.summary_v2: North America drove growth at Computacenter in 2025, with the company seeing strong performance from the UK and Germany. However, higher growth came from other regions. This outcome supports Computacenter's strategic decision to expand its business across the Atlantic over the past few years.

title: IDF Spokesman: 'Your AI is as stupid as you are'
author: Israel National News

content.full_text: IDF Spokesman: 'Your AI is as stupid as you are' IDF Arabic spokesman Avichay Adraee denounced a Hezbollah video of a missile strike in Israel as a digital forgery. The IDFs Arabic-language spokesperson, Avichay Adraee, said that a viral video shared online claiming to show an Iranian missile striking central Tel Aviv is actually a digitally manipulated clip. T…

ai_output.summary: IDF Arabic spokesperson Avichay Adraee has denounced a Hezbollah video of a missile strike in Israel as a digital forgery. The video claimed to show an Iranian missile striking central Tel Aviv, but Adraee says it is a manipulated clip. Adraee also made a personal attack on Hezbollah, calling their AI "as stupid as you are". The Israeli military is accusing Hezbollah of spreading false information. The authenticity of the video is being disputed.
ai_output.summary_v2: IDF Spokesman Avichay Adraee accused Hezbollah of creating a digitally forged video showing a missile strike in Israel, calling the AI used to create it "as stupid as you are". The video claims to show an Iranian missile hitting central Tel Aviv, but Adraee said it's a manipulated clip.

title: From digital access to learning outcomes: India’s edtech emphasis needs to evolve
author: Amitabh Kant, Gouri Gupta

content.full_text: From digital access to learning outcomes: India’s edtech emphasis needs to evolve The Bharat Survey for EdTech shows that digital access is now widespread in India, but technologies aren’t fully understood. The focus of edtech must shift from access to structured learning and improving outcomes to deliver the human capital gains we need fo… This ambition rests on human capital. Sustained economic growth will depend not only on infrastructure and innovation, but on workforce productivity. At its foundation, this means ensuring that ever…

ai_output.summary: The Bharat Survey for EdTech has found that digital access is widespread in India, but technology understanding is lacking. The focus of edtech needs to shift from access to improving learning outcomes. Economic growth in India depends on workforce productivity, which relies on human capital. To achieve this, India must ensure that education is structured to deliver better outcomes. The current emphasis on access must evolve to prioritize learning outcomes.
ai_output.summary_v2: India's edtech focus needs to shift from providing digital access to improving learning outcomes, as the country's economic growth depends heavily on workforce productivity. According to the Bharat Survey for EdTech, while digital access is widespread, technology adoption in education is not fully understood. To achieve sustained economic growth, India must prioritize structured learning and human capital development.

ai_output.summary: A documentary examines how Tesla drivers are essentially unpaid beta testers for the company's self-driving cars. Elon Musk's focus on long-term goals, including colonizing Mars, has raised concerns about the safety of the cars. Musk has topped Forbes' Billionaires list for the second year in a row. He is on track to become the world's first trillionaire. His wealth and ambition have led to criticism about the risks of his business practices.
ai_output.summary_v2: Elon Musk has topped Forbes' Billionaires list for the second consecutive year, with a growing fortune that puts him on track to become the world's first trillionaire. Meanwhile, Tesla drivers are serving as unpaid beta testers for the company's self-driving cars. This has sparked concerns about the risks associated with the technology and Musk's long-term focus on colonizing Mars.

title: Elon Musk's Tesla experiment: Unchecked ambition costs lives
author: Elizabeth Grenier

content.full_text: Elon Musk's Tesla experiment: Unchecked ambition costs lives A documentary explores how Tesla drivers serve as unpaid beta testers of the company's self-driving cars while Elon Musk focuses on his long-term goal: colonizing Mars. Elon Musk, who this week topped Forbes' Billionaires list for the second year in a row, is on course to become the world's first trillionaire. On top of his extreme wealth, Musk is bound to remain i…

ai_output.summary: A documentary criticizes Tesla's approach to self-driving cars, suggesting that drivers are acting as unpaid beta testers while the company focuses on its long-term goals. The film argues that this unchecked ambition has led to accidents and lost lives. Tesla drivers are essentially testing the company's technology, putting themselves and others at risk. Elon Musk's focus on colonizing Mars has led to concerns about the company's priorities. Musk's wealth and ambitions are said to be unmatched, with him set to become the world's first trillionaire.
ai_output.summary_v2: Tesla drivers are essentially unpaid beta testers for the company's self-driving cars as they test the technology without knowing its limitations. This arrangement has led to accidents and deaths, raising concerns about safety and accountability. Elon Musk's focus on colonizing Mars has prioritized his long-term vision over immediate concerns, including public safety.

title: Social media giants have grand plans for AI. Creators fear they'll be left out.
author: Sydney Bradley,Dan Whateley

content.full_text:
Social media giants have grand plans for AI. Creators fear they'll be left out. Social apps like Instagram and TikTok have their attention set on AI, and it's making some creators feel like an afterthought. Getty Images; Tyler Le/BI
  • Influencers are reckoning with a new boogeyman: artificial intelligence.
  • Social apps seem infatuated with AI, and it's making some creators feel like an aft…

ai_output.summary: Social media platforms like Instagram and TikTok are prioritizing AI development, leaving some creators feeling overlooked. Influencers are concerned about being replaced by AI-generated content. The shift towards AI has sparked worries among creators that they will be left behind. Social media platforms are investing heavily in AI, which is set to change the way content is created and shared. Creators are unsure what the future holds for them. This new development has created uncertainty among influencers and social media creators.
ai_output.summary_v2: Social media platforms Instagram and TikTok are investing heavily in Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology, sparking concerns among content creators who fear being left out of the AI-powered future. The shift towards AI has raised questions about the role of human influencers in a world where algorithms can create and curate content on their own.

Therefore, owners must assist with bathing and other hygiene practices. Understanding Ferret Grooming Ha…

ai_output.summary: Ferrets engage in some self-grooming, but they do not completely wash themselves like cats. They require assistance from their owners for bathing and other hygiene practices. Ferrets do not have the ability to fully clean themselves like some other animals. Their owners must intervene to keep them clean. Self-grooming is a part of a ferret's routine, but it's not enough on its own.
ai_output.summary_v2: Ferrets partially groom themselves, but require owner assistance for complete washing and hygiene care. Ferrets' grooming habits differ from those of cats, who can fully wash themselves. Ferrets need regular bathing to maintain cleanliness.
